raw_consumer_statement:
I do not shop at The XXXX XXXX, yet incurred a debt from them stating that I have a {$150.00} balance. In fact this account is fraudulent, as I called the company ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) and they did not have the correct telephone number that is mine, connected to the reference # XXXX. 
The collector then attempted to update the account with my mobile number that I called in from. I urged the collector to not update the account with my information, as it is not my debt and that I would be disputing the account.
